pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing

free.name: Free
free.features: 30 Shorts credits per month,10 TTS credits,MAVEED Watermark

creator.name: Creator
creator.features: 300 MAVEED Shorts credits per month,No watermark,60 Text to Speech credits,3 background music tracks,Prompt to Video (Veo3),Auto publish (Scheduling),Priority support

expert.name: Expert
expert.features: All Creator features,600 MAVEED Shorts credits per month,120 Text to Speech credits,All background music tracks,Advanced analytics,Auto publish (Scheduling),Priority support

professional.name: Professional
professional.features: All Expert features,Unlimited Auto publish,Unlimited MAVEED Shorts credits,Unlimited Text to Speech,White label option,Dedicated support,API access,Custom integrations
